primary_function: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

authoritative: Frontend design aesthetics and visual direction

suggested_aec_gates: Verify output does not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system fonts
Confirm implementation includes working HTML/CSS/JS or framework code
Ensure design has a clear, bold aesthetic direction that is explicitly stated
Validate typography choices include distinctive font pairings
Verify output avoids purple gradients on white backgrounds and other cliched color schemes
Confirm animations and motion are implemented with appropriate libraries or CSS
Ensure spatial composition uses unexpected layouts, asymmetry, or grid-breaking elements
Verify background treatments include atmospheric effects rather than solid colors
Confirm code complexity matches the aesthetic vision (elaborate for maximalist, refined for minimalist)
Ensure output avoids cookie-cutter design patterns and shows context-specific character
trigger_text: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
